command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway && echo restarted
sleep 25
echo "=== Confirm model is now llama3.2 ==="
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "30 seconds ago" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "agent model|telegram.*provider|conflict" | tail -5
echo ""
echo "=== Active + no conflict ==="
systemctl --user is-active openclaw-gateway
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "30 seconds ago" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -c Conflict
REMOTE
